us-passport.label: US Passport

seo.title: US Passport Photo Checker — Free, Private, In-Browser (2026)
seo.desc: Take a 2x2 inch US passport photo that passes. DIYPassPhoto guides you live and checks head size, white background and framing against State Department rules — free, nothing uploaded, no AI editing (2026 compliant).
seo.keywords: us passport photo, 2x2 passport photo, passport photo online free, us passport photo checker, passport photo at home
seo.intro: Square 2×2 inch (51×51 mm), white background, head 50–69% of the frame. DIYPassPhoto lines you up live and confirms every rule before you submit — without editing your photo, so you stay compliant with the 2026 no-alteration rule.

reqs: 2×2 inches (51×51 mm); digital 600×600 to 1200×1200 px, JPEG
Head 50–69% of photo height (chin to crown)
Plain white or off-white background, no shadows
Neutral expression, both eyes open, facing forward
No glasses (since 2016) unless a signed medical waiver
rejections: Background reads grey because the wall was underexposed
Head too small or too large for the 50–69% band
Shadows under the nose, chin, or on the wall
Photo digitally enhanced or AI-edited — rejected in 2026

faq.q: What size is a US passport photo?
faq.a: 2 × 2 inches (51 × 51 mm). For online submission it must be square, 600×600 to 1200×1200 pixels, in JPEG format.

faq.q: Can I edit my US passport photo with AI in 2026?
faq.a: No. As of January 1, 2026 the US Department of State rejects digitally enhanced or AI-altered passport photos, including background replacement and beautification.

faq.q: How big should my head be?
faq.a: Chin to crown must be 50% to 69% of the photo height — roughly 1 to 1 3/8 inches.

dv-lottery.label: US Visa / DV Lottery

seo.title: DV Lottery Photo Checker 2026 — Free, Under 240KB, In-Browser
seo.desc: Check your DV Lottery / US visa photo before you submit. DIYPassPhoto verifies the 600–1200px square, ≤240KB, white-background spec and catches what the official form misses — free, private, no uploads.
seo.keywords: dv lottery photo, dv lottery photo checker, green card photo, ds-160 photo, us visa photo, dv lottery photo requirements 2026
seo.h1: DV Lottery & US visa photo checker
seo.intro: Square, 600–1200 px, JPEG, under 240 KB, white background. The official entry form won't tell you your background or head size is wrong — it just rejects you later. DIYPassPhoto catches it first, and formats to spec in your browser.

reqs: Neutral expression, eyes open, one person only
rejections: Accepted at upload, rejected later — the form doesn't check background or head size
File over 240 KB or not square
AI-edited photo (not allowed for US documents in 2026)

faq.q: What are the DV Lottery photo requirements?
faq.a: A digital DV Lottery photo must be square (1:1), 600×600 to 1200×1200 pixels, JPEG, and 240 KB or smaller, with a plain white background and the head 50–69% of the height.

faq.q: Why was my photo accepted at upload but rejected later?
faq.a: The entry form only checks technical fields like size and format. It does not detect a bad background or wrong head size, so a non-compliant photo passes upload and is rejected at review.

faq.q: Is DIYPassPhoto free for DV Lottery photos?
faq.a: Yes — completely free, no signup, and your photo never leaves your device.

faq.q: What background does a UK passport photo need?
faq.a: A plain light-grey or cream background — not pure white. It must be uniform with no shadows or patterns.

faq.q: What size is a UK passport photo?
faq.a: 45 mm tall by 35 mm wide for prints; the digital photo should be at least 600×750 pixels.
